sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the right panel's current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All nodes on right panel (col >= 34):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    boundary = n['boundary']
    min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
    if min_col >= 34 and n['pixels'] > 1:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")

# Check if green square is movable
# First find the green square
print("\nGreen square info:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try moving the green square UP
print("\nTrying to move green square UP...")
result = action(['UP'])
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check if green square moved
seg_after = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  Green square now: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
